creator: sprice@hiwaay.net
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
Date: Thu, 13 Apr 2000 23:31:00 -0700 (PDT)
From: Kristopher Zentner <kzentner@u.washington.edu>
To: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-ports@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/17917: port update: audio/soundtracker

One last thing I wanted to get in here before the update. There's a minor
spelling error in the Makefile:

--- Makefile    Thu Apr 13 23:26:42 2000
+++ Makefile.old        Thu Apr 13 23:30:05 2000
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
 LIB_DEPENDS=   gtk12.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12
 
 .if defined(USE_GNOME)
-LIB_DEPENDS+=  gnome.3:${PORTSDIR}/x11/gnomelibs
+LIB_DEPENDS+=  gnome.3:${PORTSIDR}/x11/gnomelibs
 .endif
 
 GTK_CONFIG?=   ${X11BASE}/bin/gtk12-config
